title: After-Action Report: Missing Teams in Ratings & Rivalry Fix
scope: Composite ratings showed 197/200 teams; inaccurate rivalry assignments. Three teams completely invisible in all rankings and stats.

rationale.item: The ratings page header declared '200 teams' but the composite rankings table only listed 197 teams. Three teams were missing entirely: Mississippi Valley State (Heritage League), North Dakota State (Northern Shield), Pepperdine (Mountain West).
Auto-assigned rivalries were geographically generated without any knowledge of real-world college rivalries, producing nonsensical pairings like Purdue-Rutgers instead of Penn State-Rutgers.

actions.description: Added team files for North Carolina Central (Heritage League) and Lafayette (Midwest States); moved Sacramento State to Moonshine League; added 'school' field to Mississippi Valley State and NDSU JSON files; deleted Pepperdine and Saint Louis
Rebuilt data/conferences.json and data/cvl_conference_directory.txt from updated team files
Replaced single-entry rivalries.json with 43 protected rivalries (33 conference + 10 non-conference)

open_hooks: Prevention checklist documented: always include 'school' field; add schedule generation assertion for unscheduled teams; validate team counts in composite rankings; use protected rivalries for known matchups; run post-realignment verification steps
section_headers_original: After-Action Report: Missing Teams in Ratings & Rivalry Fix
unmapped_content: Root cause: realign_conferences.py used ti.pop('school', None) then ti['school_name'] = school_name, leaving teams with school_name but no school key. Composite ranking system (engine/ranking_composite.py) builds team list exclusively from completed games (all_teams built from game home_team/away_team) — teams with zero games never entered rankings. Conference changes table: Galactic League 11→10, Heritage League 12→13, Moonshine League 9→10, Mountain West 12→11. 43 rivalry examples: Ohio State-Michigan, Alabama-Auburn, Army-Navy, Oregon-Oregon State, Kansas-Missouri Border War, Pittsburgh-West Virginia Backyard Brawl, Florida-Florida State.
parser_notes: Date from document header: 2026-03-25. No validation claims, no non_actions or residual_risks explicitly stated beyond the prevention checklist.
